structured_payload_candidate.title: Boiler Staging - Qrequired Calculation (Primary Flow)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary-only or primary-secondary plants without flow meters in all secondary loops
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate Qrequired based on primary flow, HWST setpoint, and HWRT, using a 5-minute rolling average.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Qrequired = 0.49 * FLOW_P * (HWST_SP - HWRT) [kbtu/h]; use 5-minute rolling average of instantaneous values sampled at least every 30 seconds.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Qrequired = 0.49 * FLOW_P (HWST_SP - HWRT) [kbtu/h]. Qrequired used in logic shall be a 5-minute rolling average of instantaneous values sampled at a minimum of every 30 seconds.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Boiler Staging - Qrequired Calculation (Secondary Flow)

structured_payload_candidate.title: Boiler Staging - General Staging Requirements
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each stage must have a minimum runtime of 10 minutes; timers reset after each stage change; unavailable stages are skipped.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Each stage shall have a minimum runtime of 10 minutes. b. Timers shall reset to zero at the completion of every stage change. c. Any unavailable stage shall be skipped during staging events, but staging conditionals in the current stage shall be evaluated as per usual.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Each stage shall have a minimum runtime of 10 minutes. b. Timers shall reset to zero at the completion of every stage change. c. Any unavailable stage (see Section 5.21.3.8) shall be skipped during staging events, but staging conditionals in the current stage shall be evaluated as per usual.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hybrid - Enable First Non-Condensing Boiler
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When first non-condensing boiler is enabled, reset HWST setpoint, wait for supply temperature >140°F or 5 minutes, then start pump and enable.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Reset the non-condensing boiler hot water supply temperature setpoint per Section 5.21.4.3. b. Whenever the hot water supply temperature upstream of the non-condensing loop return pipe connection exceeds 140°F, or 5 minutes have elapsed, start the first non-condensing boiler’s primary pump. c. Whenever the hot water supply temperature upstream of the non-condensing loop return pipe connection exceeds 140°F, or 5 minutes have elapsed, start the first non-condensing loop primary pump and simultaneously open the first non-condensing boiler’s isolation valve. d. After 30 seconds, enable the lag boiler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Non-Condensing Boiler Condensation Control - Variable Speed Primary
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary-secondary plants with variable speed primary pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A reverse acting P-only loop maintains boiler entering temperature at 140°F; output from 0% at 140°F to 100% at 135°F; maps to MinPriCondSpd and MaxSecCondSpd.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Loop output 0-50% resets MinPriCondSpd from B-MinPriPumpSpdStage to 100%; 50-100% resets MaxSecCondSpd from 100% to minimum pump speed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: A reverse acting condensation control P-only loop shall maintain boiler entering temperature at 140°F. Loop output shall vary from 0% at 140°F boiler entering temperature to 100% at 135°F boiler entering temperature. Loop output shall be mapped as shown below and described subsequently. a. From 0% to 50% loop output, reset an allowable minimum primary pump speed variable, MinPriCondSpd, from B-MinPriPumpSpdStage to 100%. b. From 50% to 100% loop output, reset an allowable maximum secondary pump speed variable, MaxSecCondSpd, from 100% to minimum pump speed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Hot Water Pumps - Staging by Flow Ratio
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary-only plants with headered variable speed pumps using DP control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage pumps based on flow ratio HWFR; start next lag pump when HWFR > (number of operating pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes; shut off last lag when HWFR < (number of operating pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Start next lag pump when HWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes. b. Shut off last lag pump when HWFR < (Number of Operating Pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Start the next lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: HWFR > Number of Operating Pumps / (N-0.03). b. Shut off the last lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: HWFR < (Number of Operating Pumps -1) / (N-0.03).
